A B C F G H I L M O P R S T U V

A

accepting - Variable in class ScrabblePanel
If the person is in accepting state
add(Letter) - Method in class LetterList
Adds a new Letter to the LetterList.
add(Letter) - Method in class Rack
Adds a new Letter to an empty space in a Rack object.
addCurrentWord() - Method in class ScrabblePanel
Adds every Letter in CurrentBoardMoves to the corresponding position in BoardSpaces and remove all bonus tiles on these positions.

B

Board - class Board.
A Board object represents the Scrabble game board, which is composed of a grid of 15 by 15.
Board() - Constructor for class Board
Constructs a Board object

C

CurrentBoardMoves - Variable in class ScrabblePanel
Moves to the board before the turn is sent
currentScore - Variable in class ScrabblePanel
Score just from the current turn

F

firstturn - Variable in class ScrabblePanel
First turn flag

G

gameisover(PrintWriter, PrintWriter, BufferedReader, BufferedReader, boolean) - Static method in class ScrabbleServer
Handles when current player ends the game
gameover - Variable in class ScrabblePanel
Game over flag
get_letter() - Method in class Letter
Accessor function for the letter of a Letter object.
get_letter() - Method in class LetterList
Selects a letter at random from a LetterList object and removes that letter from the pile.
get_size() - Method in class LetterList
Accessor function for the current size of a LetterList object.
get_value() - Method in class Letter
Accessor function for the corresponding point value of a letter.
getColorMap() - Method in class Board
Accessor function for the board's ColorMap.
getLetterMap() - Method in class Board
Accessor function for the board's LetterMap.
getRackLetters() - Method in class Rack
Accessor function for the array of Letters that are contained in a Rack object.

H

HandleUndoPress() - Method in class ScrabblePanel
Invoked by the Undo button listener and also used to take all of the current letters out of the board or pile and put them back on the rack.

I

init() - Method in class Scrabble
Retrieves the content pane of the applet and adds the ScrabblePanel.
invalidturn(BufferedReader, PrintWriter) - Static method in class ScrabbleServer
Handles when current player makes an invalid move

L

Letter - class Letter.
A Letter object represents a letter tile in a Scrabble game.
Letter(char) - Constructor for class Letter
Constructs a Letter object.
LetterList - class LetterList.
A LetterList object represents the pile of letter tiles in a Scrabble game.
LetterList() - Constructor for class LetterList
Constructs a LetterList object.
lettersinrack() - Method in class Rack
Determines the current number of letters in a player's Rack.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class ScrabbleServer
Main method which starts the server, and runs the game until the end when it automatically ends.
myScore - Variable in class ScrabblePanel
Player's score

O

otherScore - Variable in class ScrabblePanel
Other player's score

P

paintComponent(Graphics) - Method in class ScrabblePanel
Draws background, rack, board, current positions of the letters, pile, score sheet and message.

R

Rack - class Rack.
A Rack object represents the rack of seven letter tiles a player may use in a Scrabble game.
Rack() - Constructor for class Rack
Constructs a Rack object
RackSpaces - Variable in class ScrabblePanel
Letters in the rack
rejectturn(BufferedReader, PrintWriter, PrintWriter, LetterList) - Static method in class ScrabbleServer
Handles when current player passes their turn

S

Scrabble - class Scrabble.
A Scrabble object is an applet that contains a ScrabblePanel.
Scrabble() - Constructor for class Scrabble
 
ScrabblePanel - class ScrabblePanel.
A ScrabblePanel is a JPanel which contains a Board, Rack, various buttons for playing the game of Scrabble, and a ScrabbleServerListener thread, which listens for any data coming from the ScrabbleServer.
ScrabblePanel() - Constructor for class ScrabblePanel
Constructs and initializes a new ScrabblePanel
ScrabbleServer - class ScrabbleServer.
A ScrabbleServer object is a server which interacts with 2 different clients (ScrabblePanel) which connect to it.
ScrabbleServer() - Constructor for class ScrabbleServer
 
setMessage(String) - Method in class ScrabblePanel
Sets a new message at the bottom of the screen
setRemaining(int) - Method in class ScrabblePanel
Sets the number of letters remaining in the pile
setTurn(boolean) - Method in class ScrabblePanel
Sets the turn status

T

TheRack - Variable in class ScrabblePanel
Player's rack
turn_is_valid(Letter[][], boolean) - Method in class Board
Determines whether or not a turn is valid in that it occupies only a single row or column, and it connects to at least one existing tile.

U

updaterack(PrintWriter, PrintWriter, BufferedReader, BufferedReader, LetterList) - Static method in class ScrabbleServer
Updates the current player's rack and if the game ends, runs the gameisover() method.
updateremaining(PrintWriter, PrintWriter, LetterList) - Static method in class ScrabbleServer
Updates the remaining letters on both player's screens

V

validturn(BufferedReader, BufferedReader, PrintWriter, PrintWriter) - Static method in class ScrabbleServer
Handles when current player submits a valid move
